content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the pending Nearby work sibling-status fallback issue in `src/cli/project.rs`. Sibling candidate filtering now consults fetched bead detail status when available, both while prefetching sibling details and before rendering sibling entries, so closed/deferred siblings whose terminal status appears only in `br show` detail are omitted and do not consume the rendered sibling limit. Added regression coverage for detail-only closed siblings and for prefetch behavior where a closed sibling appears before enough open siblings.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected nearby-context sibling prefetching, sibling entry rendering, and existing Nearby work tests.
1. [Completed] Added detail-aware `nearby_candidate_status_is_omitted` filtering and applied it to sibling summary candidates, parent-detail relation candidates, and post-prefetch retained sibling counting.
2. [Completed] Added focused regression tests for siblings closed only in fetched detail and for preventing detail-closed siblings from consuming the sibling prefetch/render limit.
3. [Completed] Ran focused tests and full repository validation gates, including the authoritative Nix build.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_filters_siblings_closed_only_in_detail --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context_filters_detail_closed_siblings_before_limit --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub load_nearby_dependency_details_skips_detail_closed_siblings_before_limit --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
